name: Lab 08 Student Hostel Tool Use Agent - M Abdullah Fawad

assignments.name: messages
assignments.value: ={{ [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a Pakistani Student Hostel Planner. Use tools for hostel room cost, transport cost, weather, and currency. Return final JSON when enough data is collected.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.body.query } ] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', messages: $json.messages, temperature: 0.2, tool_choice: 'auto', tools: [ { type: 'function', function: { name: 'get_weather', description: 'Get simulated weather for a Pakistani city.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { city: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['city'] } } }, { type: 'function', function: { name: 'convert_currency', description: 'Convert a cost between PKR, USD, GBP, or AED.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { amount: { type: 'number' }, from_currency: { type: 'string' }, to_currency: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['amount', 'from_currency', 'to_currency'] } } }, { type: 'function', function: { name: 'get_room_cost', description: 'Get monthly hostel room cost near a Pakistani university. Call this for room rent or hostel cost.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { city: { type: 'string' }, university: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['city', 'university'] } } }, { type: 'function', function: { name: 'get_transport_cost', description: 'Estimate student transport cost between Pakistani cities.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { from_city: { type: 'string' }, to_city: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['from_city', 'to_city'] } } } ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { answer: $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'Stopped after max turns. Review tool_calls for partial results.', tool_call_count: ($items('Turn Counter').at(-1).json.tool_calls || []).length, tool_calls: $items('Turn Counter').at(-1).json.tool_calls || [], domain: 'Student Hostel Planner' } }}
